reasoning: The scroll_teleport_v01 sprite shows strong Echoes-palette compatibility. The outer scroll body uses warm parchment/cream tones matching the palette's gold-beige range. The center gem is a clean sky blue with good saturation — not cold/corporate. Decorative ring dots alternate candy pink and teal-cyan, both present in the reference swatches. The hanging droplet accent is sky blue reinforcing the gem color story. Darker areas (inner ring shadow, gem depth) lean toward teal-dark rather than pure black/grey — consistent with the 'colored darks' requirement. Overall mood reads BRIGHT and MAGICAL rather than grim or cold. Saturation is well-calibrated: vibrant without neon clipping. The parchment+sky-blue+candy-pink+teal quartet is internally harmonious and directly traceable to Echoes reference swatches. Minor note: panel 1 preview background is near-black charcoal, but this is a canvas backdrop not part of the asset itself and does not affect the verdict.
